name: Great King Scumon
description: The King of Scumon who rules over a landfill called " Dust Kingdom ", its size is gargantuan. It wears something similar to a crown and is highly intelligent, and attacks with brute force in addition to throwing poop. Its Special Moves are a familiar cowardly technique ( Unchi Nage ), and falling swiftly after performing a high jump ( King Stamp ). The damage done both physically and mentally when suffering its " King Stamp " is said to be unfathomable.
